positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed central composition featuring stylized mythical celestial flora, combining geometric symmetry with organic forms. Imagine floating, bioluminescent lunar gardens composed of intertwined crystalline vines, glowing jade leaves, and stylized constellations etched into deep indigo velvet. The overall aesthetic is neo-art deco combined with psychedelic ethereal science fiction. Strong, deep contrast between the luminous, glowing teal and gold elements against a matte, midnight black background. Clean silhouette edges, intricate filigree pattern, perfect balance, suitable for repeat or focal single print, high contrast vector illustration, ultra detailed, cinematic lighting, symmetry.
